response.step_by_step_log: Identified song title and artist from video: 'アメイジングハッピーハロウィンナイト' by 'syudou'. Searched for lyrics using '"Amazing Happy Halloween Night" syudou Japanese and English lyrics'. Found matching lyrics. Breaking video into scenes based on content (intro/dialogue, then song).
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of the song "Amazing Happy Halloween Night" (originally by syudou) by three virtual idols (VTubers). The video includes dialogue segments at the beginning and middle, and the main song performance runs through the rest of the video.

scenes.description: Introductory scene with dialogue in a dark, stylized environment.
The song "Amazing Happy Halloween Night" begins, with on-screen text identifying the title and artist (syudou). The characters perform the song.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Before I knew it, I was standing in an unfamiliar world.
I didn't even know where I was, crying every single day.
I didn't even have time for that, Happy Time!
Strange people dancing, Happy Time!
Rolling around playfully.
In that foolishness, hope and fear disappeared.
For sure, I have a job to do.
Love's funeral.
Pumpkin, headset.
But it doesn't matter.
So, the dream night has begun, the music is playing and it won't stop.
Voice at the ready, shout out, today is...
Amazing Happy Halloween Night!
Jack and mischief, it's rude.
Living seriously won't suit me.
Anything is possible, why is it today?
Amazing Happy Halloween Night!
It disappeared!
It's not that, it's forever.
It disappeared!
Ideology, rules, logic, it doesn't matter.
Amazing Happy Halloween Night!
I am not a robot.
I'm just checking, even if it's heartless.
Really, is that so?
Happy Life!
Ride the music.
Dancing randomly.
In that repetition, even suspicion is lost.
Like a will-less person, like a robot, like an electric sheep.
Nightmare, NPC.
But it feels good.
What?
Oh, the audio got messed up.
Don't worry, everyone.
Sew your mouths shut.
Amazing Happy Halloween Night!
Good children's mouths have chocolate and candy.
Take off your teeth, it won't fit together.
Pull yourself together, everyone, please.
Amazing Happy Halloween Night!
I know, I know!
I know, I know!
I know, I know!
I know, I know!
I understood everything, everything.
So I don't want to see anything.
So the dream night has begun, the music is playing and it won't stop.
Voice at the ready, shout out, today is...
Amazing Happy Halloween Night!
Jack and mischief, it's rude.
Living seriously won't suit me.

Amazing Happy Halloween Night!

Not knowing is better, surely, for sure.
It disappeared!
This party has no end.
Amazing Happy Halloween Night!
